title: CSMCRI Notification 2026 - Apply Offline for 02 Project Junior Research Fellow, Project Associate Posts
description: The Central Salt and Marine Chemicals Research Institute (CSMCRI) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 02 Project Junior Research Fellow, Project Associate I Jobs. Interested and eligibile candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their B.E./B. Tech, M.Sc can apply for the CSMCRI Notification 2026. The interested applicants can apply in offline mode. Here we have mentioned the ed...
